middleware.description: Resolves the caller's active Organization. Precedence: (1) `X-Organization-Id` header — accepts ULID (`org_<26>`) OR slug (case-insensitive) — validated against `WHERE tenant_id=? AND (id=? OR slug=?) AND deleted_at IS NULL`; (2) me.profile.default_organization_id when the user has pinned one; (3) tenant.default_organization via cache (fallback). Refuses paused OR archived Organizations on write routes (405 ORGANIZATION_NOT_WRITABLE); allows them on read routes so members can inspect their state.

Refuses the request unless the resolved Organization is non-null AND active. Used on domain routes that MUST scope to an org (Branch creation, Team creation). Off for tenant-wide routes (Region, Subscription).

For routes that read descendants of an Organization: refuses when the caller's authorised org is not an ancestor of the requested subtree (uses tree_path prefix scan). Prevents cross-org data leaks when a caller has multiple org memberships but is scoped to only one.
